description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/offa/docker-images/docker-build:stable Docker image with a docker:dind service and sets the DOCKER_DRIVER variable to overlay2. Add a before_script that runs docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p ${CI_JOB_TOKEN} ${CI_REGISTRY}. Define a single job named placeholder (default stage) that executes the script command echo "*** Placeholder ***". The pipeline has no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules, and runs on every pipeline execution.
